content:
Dear Morimens Support Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

My name is ErioTo, and I am a player on the Morimens server. I am writing to request a review and reconsideration regarding the ban placed on my account.

On February 3rd (KST), I attempted to purchase an in-game item worth approximately 120,000 KRW. However, due to a technical error in the App Store, the payment did not go through immediately. The amount was eventually charged to my credit card on February 4th.

Because I did not receive the item properly, and due to language barriers, I contacted Apple Support directly. They advised me to proceed with a safe refund request, reassuring me that the game company would handle the matter appropriately. Based on that guidance, I submitted a refund request.

To my surprise, I recently found that my account was banned, possibly due to the refund. I want to express that I never intended any abuse or policy violation. I have truly enjoyed your game and have invested approximately 1,000,000 KRW over the past two months. I was especially looking forward to the event starting on February 9th.

I respectfully ask you to consider lifting the ban, as I acted in good faith and only followed Apple’s instructions. I am willing to resolve any remaining issues, and I sincerely hope to continue enjoying the game.

For your reference:
- Purchase Order ID: 2026020315322901200000000000496  
- Character ID: 100542759  
- Server: Morimens  
- Nickname: ErioTo  
- I will attach my credit card statement and in-app purchase history showing the dates (Feb 3 and Feb 4) to clarify the situation.

Thank you very much for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,  
ErioTo
thread_title: Request for Account Unban - ErioTo / Morimens Server

content:
So as the title says, I wonder if the possibility of having an API for the game is currently a thing or not. It would be very nice to be able to get things such as complete awakeners kit, dtide stats, etc. c: 

If not, is there any way to get the character usage statistics in dtide? possibly sorted by enlightens & alert?
